entry.title: MÁDARA Melting Cleansing Oil 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Face Cleansing
Price: 19.90

This oil-based cleanser with nourishing lipids deeply, yet delicately purifies and cleans the skin, melting away long wear makeup and mineral sunscreen. Removes impurities without irritating the skin or stripping its natural protective barrier. 

The oil melts upon contact with water and is easy to rinse. Leaves the skin clean, luxuriously soft and nourished. Suitable for use around the eyes.

How to use: Massage the oil into dry or damp skin, add some water.  Rinse off and follow with your regular face cleansing routine. Suitable for double cleansing.

Ingredients: CAPRYLIC/CAPRIC TRIGLYCERIDE; GLYCERIN**; HELIANTHUS ANNUUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED OIL*; AQUA; SUCROSE LAURATE; SUCROSE PALMITATE; AROMA; ALCOHOL; TOCOPHEROL; CI 77163 (BISMUTH CHLORIDE OXIDE)****; OENOTHERA BIENNIS (EVENING PRIMROSE) OIL*; PRUNUS AMYGDALUS DULCIS (ALMOND) OIL*; GLYCOSPHINGOLIPIDS; GLYCOLIPIDS; BENZYL SALICYLATE**; LIMONENE**; CITRUS AURANTIUM PEEL OIL; CITRAL**

*Ingredients from organic farming
**Made using organic ingredients
***From natural essential oils
****Pure mineral pigments

100% Natural origin of total
39% Organic of total

* Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: MÁDARA Cleansing Milk 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Face Cleansing
Price: 19.90

Cleanse the skin and remove makeup with this mild and soothing cleansing milk. Formulated with an innovative complex of 100% natural oils that facilitate the makeup removal and provide a super-smooth skin feel. Gently, yet effectively removes even waterproof makeup, leaving the skin smooth, fresh and hydrated. Boosts the performance of subsequently used moisturisers. The non-irritating velvety formula is also suitable for use around the eyes.

How to use: Apply a small amount on a cotton pad to remove makeup and cleanse the skin from all impurities. Rinse off with water or wipe off with a clean cotton pad or a cloth. Follow with a moisturiser.

Ingredients: ALOE BARBADENSIS (ALOE) LEAF JUICE*; HELIANTHUS ANNUUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED OIL*; SUCROSE DISTEARATE; PENTYLENE GLYCOL; BUTYROSPERMUM PARKII (SHEA) BUTTER*; ISOAMYL LAURATE; SUCROSE STEARATE; GLYCERIN**; AROMA; PALMITIC ACID; STEARIC ACID; XANTHAN GUM; LACTIC ACID; GLYCERYL CAPRYLATE; AVENA SATIVA (OAT) KERNEL EXTRACT*; CALENDULA OFFICINALIS (CALENDULA) FLOWER EXTRACT*; PLANTAGO MAJOR (PLANTAIN) LEAF EXTRACT*; TILIA CORDATA (LINDEN) FLOWER EXTRACT*; AQUA; ASCORBYL PALMITATE; SODIUM PHYTATE; TOCOPHEROL; VANILLIN; JASMINUM OFFICINALE (JASMINE) EXTRACT; LEUCONOSTOC/RADISH ROOT FERMENT FILTRATE; BENZYL SALICYLATE***; LIMONENE***; CITRUS AURANTIUM PEEL OIL; CITRAL***; CITRONELLOL***; GERANIOL***; EUGENOL***

*Ingredients from organic farming
**Made using organic ingredients
***From natural essential oils

100% Natural origin of total
25% Organic of total

* Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: MÁDARA SOS Rich Hydra-Barrier CICA Cream 40ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Day Cream
Price: 37.90

Instantly sooth and comfort very dry, dehydrated, stressed and reactive skin with this rich hydra-barrier cream. 

Formulated with the hydrating and calming Centella Asiatica (CICA) extract to bolster skin’s protective barrier and help restore the epidermal balance. Hyaluronic acid, soothing bisabolol, nurturing shea butter and repairing ceramides in the formulation help to improve moisture retention, prevent dryness-induced discomfort and signs of premature ageing. Works to diminish the feeling of taut and itchy skin and unveils a better-looking complexion by promoting skin’s healthy radiance.

How to use: Apply a generous amount to clean skin. Use in the morning and night or whenever your skin feels dry, taut and stressed.

Ingredients: ALOE BARBADENSIS (ALOE) LEAF JUICE*; HELIANTHUS ANNUUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED OIL*; GLYCERIN; THEOBROMA CACAO (COCOA) SEED BUTTER*; CETEARYL ALCOHOL; PENTYLENE GLYCOL; POLYGLYCERYL-3 STEARATE; BETAINE; SODIUM PCA; CAPRYLIC/CAPRIC TRIGLYCERIDE; DICAPRYLYL CARBONATE; ISOAMYL LAURATE; OCTYLDODECANOL; AROMA; IRVINGIA GABONENSIS KERNEL BUTTER; BUTYROSPERMUM PARKII (SHEA) BUTTER*; AQUA; HYDROGENATED COCO-GLYCERIDES; ORYZA SATIVA (RICE) BRAN OIL; VEGETABLE OIL; XANTHAN GUM; BISABOLOL; HELIANTHUS ANNUUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED WAX; ORYZA SATIVA (RICE) BRAN WAX; RHUS SUCCEDANEA FRUIT WAX; PAEONIA LACTIFLORA (PEONY) ROOT EXTRACT; BORAGO OFFICINALIS (BORAGE) SEED OIL*; CELLULOSE; GLYCOSPHINGOLIPIDS; LACTIC ACID; OENOTHERA BIENNIS (EVENING PRIMROSE) OIL*; RUBUS IDAEUS (RASPBERRY) SEED OIL*; GLYCOLIPIDS; SODIUM PHYTATE; CENTELLA ASIATICA (PENNYWORT) LEAF EXTRACT; ASCORBYL PALMITATE; TOCOPHEROL; HYDROLYZED HYALURONIC ACID; SODIUM HYALURONATE; CI 77491 (IRON OXIDES)***; CITRONELLOL**; GERANIOL**; BENZYL SALICYLATE**; EUGENOL**

*Ingredients from Organic Farming
**From natural essential oils
***Pure mineral pigments

99% Natural origin of total
27% Organic of total

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: NURME Mint Rosemary Shampoo for Men 250ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Nurme
Type: Shampoo
Price: 10.50

Natural shampoo for men contains essential oils of mint and rosemary, which have a refreshing and revitalizing effect on hair. The shampoo leaves a pleasant fragrance and invigorates hair roots.

Rosemary essential oil helps to soothe dry scalp problems, while peppermint revitalizes and refreshes. This natural shampoo for men has been rated by users as one of the best hair cleansers to fight dandruff. Stress, the changing seasons and a weakened immune system are just a few of the factors that can cover the scalp with white patches of dandruff. Rosemary soothes itchy scalps and contains anti-inflammatory and anti-bacterial components, so in milder cases, the right choice of shampoo may be all you need to get rid of dandruff.

How to use: Massage a small amount of shampoo into the hair in a circular motion. Leave on for 1-2 minutes and rinse. Repeat the process if necessary and use a conditioner.

Ingredients: Aqua, Coco-Glucoside, Sodium Coco-Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary) Leaf Oil, Citric Acid, Glyceryl Oleate, Mentha Piperita (Peppermint) Oil, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Limonene*

*Occurs naturally in essential oil

0% Parabens | 0% Silicones | 0% Synthetic and fragrances

entry.title: LUUV Deodorant Lemongrass Green 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: LUUV
Type: Deodorant
Price: 11.90

LUUV Unisex deodorant with natural deodorizing agents prevents the formation of body odor and keeps you fresh and dry all day long!

The unisex deodorant allows the skin to function naturally and does not clog pores. Rice starch in the deodorant absorbs sweat, sage extract combats odor-causing bacteria, and aloe moisturizes and soothes delicate underarm skin. The deodorant dries quickly and does not leave stains on clothes. The fresh blend of essential oils is suitable for both men and women.

The Unisex deodorant is certified with the globally recognized ECOCERT/COSMOS certification, so you can be sure you’re using a product that’s not only good for you but also for our planet. Additionally, it is aluminum-free, alcohol-free, and soda-free, and 100% vegan!

  • 24h protection 
  • Fresh scent that is suitable for both men and women 
  • Non-irritating 
  • Non-comedogenic
  • Moisturizes and soothes
  • Preserves skin’s natural function
  • Free from soda, alcohol, and aluminum

natural | cruelty free | sustainable | paraben free | vegan | certified

The product is made in Estonia

How to use: Apply to clean underarms. Use daily.

Ingredients: Aqua, Zinc Ricinoleate, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Oryza Sativa (Rice) Starch, Propanediol, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Triethyl Citrate, Polyglyceryl-3-Caprylate, Salvia Officinalis Leaf Extract, Citric acid, Citrus Limon Peel (Lemon) Oil, Cymbopogon Flexuosus (Lemongrass) Oil, Citrus Aurantium Bergamia Fruit (Bergamot) Oil, Glyceryl Caprylate, Benzoic Acid, Xanthan Gum, Limonene, Citral, Linalool, Geraniol

entry.title: BERRICHI Age Defence Face Cream for Men REFILL 30ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Berrichi
Type: Day Cream
Price: 24.90

Face cream For Men contains powerful antioxidants furcellaran and astaxanthin, which anti-aging and deep moisturizing effect has been confirmed in many scientific studies. We get furcellaran from algae grown in Estonian waters, astaxanthin from other clean and Nordic sea plants.

Astaxanthin acts as if on the skin natural doping. This powerful antioxidant can penetrate cell membranes, affecting the skin deeply. The humidity level balances and premature wrinkles generation decreases. The skin is protected from the attack of UV rays and free radicals.

The cream is well suited for after-shave care.

Berrichi Age Defence Face Cream for Men:

  • Deep moisturizing
  • Anti-aging
  • Reduces dryness and scar tissue.
  • Suitable for after-shave care.
  • With light absorption.
  • Contains furcellaran, astaxanthin, aloe vera, cacay-oil.

From the Amazon rainforest cacay– oil improves skin elasticity and evens skin tone. Aloe soothes and relieves irritations.

For all skin types. 

How to use: Apply to clean skin or over serum. 

Ingredients: Aqua, Persea Gratissima oil (Organic Avocado Oil)*, Prunus Armeniaca kernel oil (Organic Apricot kernel oil)*, Caryodendron Orinocense seed oil (Cacay Oil), Cetearyl Olivate/Sorbitan Olivate (Olivem1000), Cetearyl Alcohol, ), Simmondsia Chinesis seed oil (Organic Jojoba oil)*, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice/Potassium Sorbate/Sodium Benzoate/Citric acid (Aloe Vera), Glycerin**, Dehydroacetic Acid/Benzoic Acid/Benzyl Alcohol/Sorbic Acid (Sharomix705), Furcellaria Lumbricalis extract (Furcellaran), Haemotococcus pluvialis/Tocopherol (Astaxanthin oil)

Free from parabens, silicones, mineral oils, synthetic flavours and colourants. Cruelty free and vegan. Suitable for sensitive and allergic skin.

entry.title: BERRICHI Age Defence Face Cream for Men 30ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Berrichi
Type: Day Cream
Price: 30.90

Face cream For Men contains powerful antioxidants furcellaran and astaxanthin, which anti-aging and deep moisturizing effect has been confirmed in many scientific studies. We get furcellaran from algae grown in Estonian waters, astaxanthin from other clean and Nordic sea plants.

Astaxanthin acts as if on the skin natural doping. This powerful antioxidant can penetrate cell membranes, affecting the skin deeply. The humidity level balances and premature wrinkles generation decreases. The skin is protected from the attack of UV rays and free radicals.

The cream is well suited for after-shave care.

Berrichi Age Defence Face Cream for Men:

  • Deep moisturizing
  • Anti-aging
  • Reduces dryness and scar tissue.
  • Suitable for after-shave care.
  • With light absorption.
  • Contains furcellaran, astaxanthin, aloe vera, cacay-oil.

From the Amazon rainforest cacay– oil improves skin elasticity and evens skin tone. Aloe soothes and relieves irritations.

For all skin types.

The glass bottle and pump system are reusable.

Free from parabens, silicones, mineral oils, synthetic flavours and colourants. Cruelty free and vegan. Suitable for sensitive and allergic skin.

entry.title: Blokzeep Shampoo Bar Cornflower 60g
entry.summary:
Vendor: Blokzeep
Type: Shampoo
Price: 8.99

Due to the natural ingredients, the Cornflower shampoo bar is suitable for every hair type - and especially for men due to the heavier & fresh scent. Linden blossom extract has been added to this shampoo bar, which has a soothing effect on your scalp. It also helps renew and hydrate damaged skin, which also strengthens your hair roots. The result? A full head of healthy hair!

This Cornflower shampoo bar is sustainable for three reasons:

  • Less water: A normal bottle of shampoo contains 80% water, which must be transported every time.
  • More efficient use: A shampoo block lasts 3 times as long as a normal bottle of shampoo.
  • Plastic-free packaging

This Shampoo bar Cornflower is handmade within Europe and transported to the Netherlands in a CO2 neutral manner. Packaging is 100% plastic-free.

How to use: Rub the shampoo in your hands until a lather forms and apply directly on wet hair. Massage the shampoo on the scalp, then rinse. After use, leave the shampoo in a dry place to set until the next time you wash your hair.

Ingredients: Sodium Coco-Sulfate, Aqua, Parfum, Theobroma Cacao Seed Butter, Macadamia Ternifolia Seed Oil, Olea Europaea (Olive) Fruit Oil, Tilia Cordata Extract, Phenoxyethanol, Tocopherol (Vitamin E), Linalool, Limonene, Coumarin, Alpha Isomethyl Ionone, Benzyl Benzoate, Geraniol, CI 42090

natural ingredients | cruelty-free | handmade

entry.title: MÁDARA HIS After Shave Serum 75ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Face Serum
Price: 29.90

Beat dryness and discomfort with this after shave serum. 

The refreshing formula instantly tones and soothes the skin, helping prevent ingrown hair and minimising breakouts and razor bumps. Enriched with skin-identical moisturisers and antioxidant-rich oak bark that hydrate and calm irritated skin.

Suitable for sensitive skin.

How to use: Apply to clean, dry face and neck after shaving.

Ingredients: Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe) Leaf Juice, Glycerin, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Pentylene Glycol, Cantharellus cibarius (chanterelle) extract, Polyglyceryl-6 Stearate, Sodium PCA, Coco-Caprylate/Caprate, Isoamyl Laurate, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Aqua, Caffeine, Hydrolyzed Rhodophyceae Extract, Polyglyceryl-6 Behenate, Aroma, Octyldodecanol, Xanthan Gum, Quercus Robur (Oak) Bark Extract, Cellulose, Irvingia gabonensis kernel butter, Potassium Hydroxide, Hydrogenated Coco-glycerides, Tocopherol, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid, Sodium Hyaluronate, Sodium phytate, Sodium Benzoate, Menthyl Lactate, Potassium Sorbate, Limonene, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Eucalyptus Globulus Oil, Lavandula Oil/Extract, Linalyl Acetate, Linalool, Mentha Viridis Leaf Oil, Eugenia Caryophyllus Oil, Carvone, Pinene, Citral, Menthol, Pogostemon Cablin Oil, Camphor, Cinnamomum Cassia Leaf Oil, Laurus Nobilis Leaf Oil, Pelargonium Graveolens Flower Oil, Beta-Caryophyllene, Terpineol, Citronellol, Geraniol

COSMOS ORGANIC certified

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: MÁDARA HIS Eye Cream 17ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Eye Cream
Price: 27.90

Say goodbye to tired eyes with this rejuvenating eye cream. Enriched with energising caffeine and smoothing chanterelle, it effectively targets dry eye area, puffiness, wrinkles and dark circles. 

Suitable for sensitive skin.

How to use: Apply to clean skin morning and evening. 

Ingredients: Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe) Leaf Juice, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Glycerin, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Pentylene Glycol, Cantharellus cibarius (chanterelle) extract, Cetearyl Alcohol, Sodium PCA, Dipalmitoyl hydroxyproline, Caffeine, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Coco- Caprylate, Dicaprylyl Carbonate, Xanthan Gum, Aesculus Hippocastanum (Horse Chestnut) Seed Extract, Quercus Robur (Oak) Bark Extract, Cellulose, Palmitic acid, Stearic Acid, Tocopherol, Aroma, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Potassium Hydroxide, Octyldodecanol, Aqua, Sodium phytate, Irvingia gabonensis kernel butter, Vitis vinifera (grape) Leaf Extract, Hydrogenated Coco-glycerides, Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid, Sodium Hyaluronate, Sodium Benzoate, Ginkgo Biloba (Ginkgo) Leaf Extract, Potassium Sorbate, Escin, Limonene, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Eucalyptus Globulus Oil, Lavandula Oil/Extract, Linalyl Acetate, Linalool, Mentha Viridis Leaf Oil, Eugenol, Eugenia Caryophyllus Oil, Carvone, Pinene, Citral, Menthol, Pogostemon Cablin Oil, Camphor, Cinnamomum Cassia Leaf Oil, Laurus Nobilis Leaf Oil, Pelargonium Graveolens Flower Oil, Beta-Caryophyllene

COSMOS ORGANIC certified

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: MÁDARA HIS Face Cream 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Day Cream
Price: 39.90

Achieve instantly energised and hydrated skin with this one-and-done moisturiser. 

This lightweight, fast-absorbing moisturiser deeply hydrates and revives dull and tired complexions. Enriched with brightening vitamin C, skin-identical moisturisers, antioxidant-rich oak bark and smoothing chanterelle, it instantly comforts the skin for a soft and supple feel. Targets excess oiliness and improves the look of skin tone. 

Suitable for sensitive skin.

How to use: Apply to clean skin every morning and evening.

Ingredients: Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe) Leaf Juice, Aqua, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Glycerin, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Pentylene Glycol, Cantharellus cibarius (chanterelle) extract, Cetearyl Alcohol, Butylene Glycol, Ascorbyl Glucoside, Sodium PCA, Potassium Hydroxide, Ferulic Acid, Tocopherol, Sodium Citrate, Aroma, Dicaprylyl Carbonate, Isoamyl Laurate, Xanthan Gum, Quercus Robur (Oak) Bark Extract, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Ricinus Communis (Castor) Seed Oil, Palmitic acid, Stearic Acid, Sodium phytate, Citric acid, CI 75815 (Chlorophyllin Copper Complex), Alteromonas Ferment Extract, Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid, Phenethyl Alcohol, Sodium Benzoate, Sodium Hyaluronate, Potassium Sorbate, Maltodextrin, Limonene, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Eucalyptus Globulus Oil, Lavandula Oil/Extract, Linalyl Acetate, Linalool, Mentha Viridis Leaf Oil, Eugenol, Eugenia Caryophyllus Oil, Carvone, Pinene, Citral, Menthol, Pogostemon Cablin Oil, Camphor, Cinnamomum Cassia Leaf Oil, Laurus Nobilis Leaf Oil, Pelargonium Graveolens Flower Oil, Beta-Caryophyllene, Terpineol, Citronellol, Geraniol

COSMOS ORGANIC certified

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: MÁDARA Vitamin C Intense Glow Concentrate 30ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Face Serum
Price: 42.90

Dial up your skin’s glow with this super-potent brightening concentrate, starring a powerful blend of ferulic acid and vitamins C+E that tackle visible signs of aging such as fine lines, hyperpigmentation and loss of elasticity.

Ferulic acid works to firm the skin and multiplies its defence against free radical damage, while the combination of vitamins C and E help brighten and even out skin tone, boosting radiance and supporting collagen synthesis.

How to use: Apply to clean skin, follow with a moisturiser. Recommended to use daily or or as a treatment course 2–3 times a year. Avoid direct sun exposure after application and wear sunscreen.  

Ingredients: Aqua, Glycerin, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Pentylene Glycol, Butylene Glycol, Ascorbyl Glucoside, Cetearyl Alcohol, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Betaine, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Ferulic Acid, Sodium PCA, Tocopherol, Hippophae Rhamnoides (Sea Buckthorn) Fruit Oil, Coco-Caprylate/Caprate, Dicaprylyl Carbonate, Isoamyl Laurate, Triheptanoin, Potassium Hydroxide, Cellulose, Aroma, Sodium Citrate, Xanthan Gum, Rubus Chamaemorus (Cloudberry) Fruit Extract, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Ricinus Communis (Castor) Seed Oil, Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid, Sodium Hyaluronate, Sodium phytate, Citric acid, Limonene, Citronellol, Linalool, Geraniol, Citral

COSMOS NATURAL certified

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: MÁDARA Vitamin C Illuminating Recovery Cream 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Day Cream
Price: 40.90

​Treat your skin with this glow-enhancing moisturiser that instantly revives dull and tired complexion, promoting more even skin tone. Formulated with a stabilised form of Vitamin C, a potent antioxidant, used in skincare and dermatology to brighten, improve skin tone and promote a healthy glow, it also helps to prevent hyperpigmentation and dark spots. Hyaluronic acid ensures intense hydration, whilst the seaweed extract boosts the brightening effect, leaving the skin feeling softer and smoother and looking youthfully fresh and beautifully radiant.

How to use: Apply daily on clean skin. Recommended to use daily or as a treatment course 2–3 times a year. Avoid direct sun exposure after the application. Use sunscreen afterwards.

Ingredients: Aqua, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Glycerin, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Pentylene Glycol, Cetearyl Alcohol, Ascorbyl Glucoside, Isoamyl Laurate, Betaine, Dicaprylyl Carbonate, Sodium PCA, Aroma, Potassium Hydroxide, Palmitic acid, Stearic Acid, Sodium Citrate, Xanthan Gum, Rubus Chamaemorus (Cloudberry) Fruit Extract, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Ricinus Communis (Castor) Seed Oil, Tocopherol, Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid, Sodium Hyaluronate, Sodium phytate, Ascophyllum Nodosum (Brown Algae) Extract, Citric acid, CI 77492 (Iron Oxides), Limonene, Citronellol, Linalool, Geraniol, Citral

COSMOS NATURAL certified

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: MÁDARA Vitamin C Illuminating Recovery Cream 15ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Day Cream
Price: 13.90

​Treat your skin with this glow-enhancing moisturiser that instantly revives dull and tired complexion, promoting more even skin tone. Formulated with a stabilised form of Vitamin C, a potent antioxidant, used in skincare and dermatology to brighten, improve skin tone and promote a healthy glow, it also helps to prevent hyperpigmentation and dark spots. Hyaluronic acid ensures intense hydration, whilst the seaweed extract boosts the brightening effect, leaving the skin feeling softer and smoother and looking youthfully fresh and beautifully radiant.

How to use: Apply daily on clean skin. Recommended to use daily or as a treatment course 2–3 times a year. Avoid direct sun exposure after the application. Use sunscreen afterwards.

entry.title: MÁDARA DETOX Ultra Purifying MUD mask 60ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Face Mask
Price: 25.90

Clarify, rejuvenate and recharge the skin with this deep-purifying detox mask. Formulated with Nordic forest lake mud, this mask ensures multiple skincare benefits: it purifies the complexion, tightens pores and conditions, absorbs excess oils, reduces outbreaks, detoxifies the skin, eliminates traces of acne and minor inflammation and helps to retain skin’s hydration. Leaves the skin feeling clean, fresh, revitalized.

How to use: ​Recommended to use twice a week as clarifying treatment for oily, combination skin, skin with enlarged pores, blemishes, acne. Once a week to combat skin dullness, tiredness and occasional inflammation.

Ingredients: Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe) Leaf Juice, Kaolin, Glycerin, Montmorillonite, Diatomaceous Earth, Butylene Glycol, Aqua, Sodium PCA, Sodium levulinate, Olea Europaea (Olive) Fruit Oil, Tocopherol, Xanthan Gum, Propanediol, Lactic Acid, Sodium anisate, Glyceryl Caprylate, Charcoal Powder, Alchemilla Vulgaris (Lady's Mantle) Extract, Algae (Algae) Extract, Nasturtium Officinale (Watercress) Flower/Leaf Extract, CI 77491 (Iron Oxides), CI 77492 (Iron Oxides), CI 77499 (Iron Oxides), CI 75810 (Chlorophyll), Rhamnose, Maltodextrin, Glucose, Glucuronic Acid

*Ingredients from Organic Farming
**Pure mineral pigments

99% Natural origin of total
16% Organic of total

COSMOS NATURAL certified

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: MÁDARA PEEL Creamy Clay AHA Peel Mask 60ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Face Mask
Price: 25.90

Uniting 7% lactic acid and micro-clay, this supercharged face mask works to gently polish the skin’s surface, sloughing off dead skin cells and unclogging pores to reveal a clearer, fresher and more radiant complexion.

The dermatologically tested formula encourages a more even skin tone and improves texture, contributing to softer, smoother and brighter skin.

Enriched with white clay which binds impurities and helps prevent breakouts, as well as jojoba oil and extract of yarrow that boast soothing and anti-inflammatory properties.

Not suitable for fragile, hypersensitive skin. 

 

How to use: Gently massage over clean face and neck in circular motions, avoiding the eye area. Leave on for 3-10 minutes. Follow with a moisturiser of your choice. Use 2-3 times weekly, avoid sun exposure after use. 

Ingredients: Aqua, Dicaprylyl Carbonate, Kaolin, Lactic Acid, Glycerin, Pentylene Glycol, Polyglyceryl-6 Stearate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Potassium Hydroxide, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Xanthan Gum, Polyglyceryl-6 Behenate, Aroma, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Palmitic acid, Perlite, Stearic Acid, Achillea Millefolium (Yarrow) Extract, Charcoal Powder, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Tocopherol, Linalool, Geraniol, Citral, Limonene

COSMOS NATURAL certified

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: MÁDARA PEEL Brightening AHA Peel mask 60ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Face Mask
Price: 25.90

Give your skin an instant radiance boost with this active AHA peeling mask. Formulated with nature’s superdose of active acids, this mask ensures multiple skincare benefits: Removes the dead cells to uncover smoother, more radiant skin surface, exfoliates to stimulate cell turnover and regeneration, brightens the complexion and diminishes appearance of age-spots and fine lines, helps to unclog pores and improves the absorption and effect of other cosmetic products. Especially beneficial for dull, tired skin with signs of aging, lines, wrinkles, age-spots, lack of glow, clogged pores and acne.

How to use: ​Apply to clean skin, leave on for 3–10 minutes. Rinse off thoroughly, follow with a toner and moisturiser of your choice.

Ingredients: Aqua, Lactic Acid, Glycerin, Lavandula Angustifolia (Lavender) Flower Water, Galactoarabinan, Potassium Hydroxide, Microcrystalline Cellulose, Glucomannan, Mica (CI 77019), CI 77891 (Titanium Dioxide), Aroma, Cellulose gum, Pyrus Cydonia (Quince) Fruit Extract, Sambucus Nigra (Elder) Flower Extract, Ethyl Lauroyl Arginate HCl, Xanthan Gum, Benzyl Alcohol, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Limonene

COSMOS NATURAL certified

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: NURME Protective Mint Lip Balm for Men 4,5g
entry.summary:
Vendor: Nurme
Type: Lip Balms
Price: 5.90

With cocoa butter and vitamin E. Lip balm for men protects against cold, wind and sun. Softens lips and prevents chapping. The lip balm has a pleasantly refreshing mint scent.

How to use: Apply to lips.

Ingredients: Cera Alba (Beeswax), Theobroma Cacao (Cocoa) Seed Butter, Persea Gratissima (Avocado) Oil, Tocopherol (Vitamin-E), Mentha Viridis (Spearmint) Leaf Oil, Limonene*, Linalool*. * Occurs naturally in essential oils.

entry.title: NAIF Nurturing Night Cream 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Night Cream
Price: 23.90

Naïf Nurturing Night Cream contributes to a good night's sleep. The regenerating night cream soothes the skin and supports the natural skin process. Includes almond oil, shea butter and macadamia extract for ultimate hydration and moisture retention. No more dry spots!

The cream absorbs quickly, doesn't stick and doesn't make the skin feel tight. So you don't have to worry when resting your head on your pillow. The night cream is made without mineral oils, microplastics and silicones.

The Naïf regenerating night cream is for every skin type. So also for the most sensitive skin. All Naïf products are vegan, made with a gentle fragrance, are dermatologically tested and do not contain the 26 most common allergens.

How to use: A night cream is best applied if you apply a good, thick amount. Do this on clean, cleansed skin. And don't forget to apply it to the neck and décolleté. 

Ingredients: Aqua/ Water, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (Sweet Almond) Oil, Glycerin, Persea Gratissima (Avocado) Oil, Macadamia Integrifolia Seed Oil, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Methylpropanediol, Linum Usitatissimum (Linseed) Seed Oil, Cetearyl Alcohol, Cetyl Alcohol, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Sucrose Stearate, Tocopherol, Helianthus Annuus, (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Xanthan Gum, Caprylyl Glycol, Phenylpropanol, Parfum/Fragrance, Citric Acid, Sodium Hydroxide

Tube made from recycled plastic

entry.title: NAIF Nurturing Day Cream 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Day Cream
Price: 23.90

The multitasking Naïf Nurturing Day Cream hydrates and protects face, neck and décolleté during the day from the harmful effects of UV radiation. Al this thanks to the added tomato extract. To support the natural skin process, the day cream contains natural oils, such as avocado and almond oil.

The day cream is quickly absorbed and you don't need much of it. That's why you'll be able to use the bioplastic tube's content even longer. All Naïf products are vegan, made with a gentle fragrance, are dermatologically tested and do not contain the 26 most common allergens.

How to use: Apply the Nurturing Day Cream evenly (you don't need much) to a cleansed face, neck and décolleté.

The natural SPF6 from tomato extract provides for protection against harmful UV rays.

Ingredients: Aqua/Water, Glycerin, Methylpropanediol, Persea Gratissima (Avocado) Oil, Cetearyl Alcohol, Macadamia Integrifolia Seed Oil, Cetyl Alcohol, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (Sweet Almond) Oil, Prunus Armeniaca (Apricot) Kernel Oil, Sucrose Stearate, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Linum Usitatissimum (Linseed Seed) Oil, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Solanum Lycopersicum (Tomato Fruit/Leaf/Stem) Extract, Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary Leaf) Extract, Tocopherol, Caprylyl Glycol, Phenylpropanol, Xanthan Gum, Parfum/Fragrance, Citric Acid, Sodium Hydroxide

Tube made from recycled plastic

entry.title: NAIF Cleansing Face Wash 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Face Cleansing
Price: 13.90

The gel transforms into a milky formula on contact with water. The advantage of this gel-to-milk formula is that it cleanses the skin without drying it out. Therefore, this face cleanser is suitable for all skin types, even for very oily or sensitive skin and the thinner skin around the eyes.

Because the facial cleanser contains natural oils, the skin's PH level remains undisturbed and the skin feels moisturized and supple afterward.

All Naïf products are vegan, made with a gentle fragrance, are dermatologically tested, and do not contain the 26 most common allergens.

How to use: Moisten the face with lukewarm water. Apply a fingertip-sized amount of gel to a (washable) cotton pad or in the palm of your hand and massage the gel all over your face. The gel will now have a milky texture and slowly foams. After cleansing, rinse with lukewarm water, pat skin dry and apply a nourishing day or night cream. 

Ingredients: Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Glycerin, Aqua/Water, Linum Usitatissimum Seed Oil, Sucrose Palmitate, Parfum/Fragrance, Caprylyl Glycol, Tocopherol

Tube made from recycled plastic

entry.title: NAIF Circular Face Scrub 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Facial Scrub
Price: 16.90

Naïf Circular Face Scrub cleanses your skin and removes dead skin cells, stimulating cell renewal. Result: radiant skin. The face scrub also contains natural oils, such as macadamia, avocado and sweet almond oil. These ingredients condition your skin and keep your skin soft and supple, without making your face feel tight, after exfoliating.

All Naïf products are 100% vegan, made with a gentle fragrance and are dermatologically tested, free from the 26 most common allergens. Mild for the skin, due to the fine grain, which also allows you to use the scrub several times a week.

How to use: Scrub your face once or twice a week for beautiful, healthy skin. Slightly moisten your face and apply the pea-sized scrub to the inside of your hand. Using your fingers, massage the scrub onto your face for at least 30 seconds using circular motions. Rinse with lukewarm water. 

Ingredients: Aqua, Calcium Carbonate, Macadamia Integrifolia Seed Oil, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis Oil, Persea Gratissima Oil, Methylpropanediol, Cetyl Alcohol, Cetearyl Alcohol, Glycerin, Sucrose Stearate, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Linum Usitatissimum Oil, Caprylyl Glycol, Parfum, Xanthan Gum, Tocopherol, Phenylpropanol, Bisabolol, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Citric Acid, Sodium Hydroxide

Tube made from recycled plastic

entry.title: MÁDARA Hydra-Derm Balancing Fluid 40ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Day Cream
Price: 22.90

This light-weight face moisturiser intensely hydrates and balances, ensuring lasting comfort and helping to improve the condition of problem-prone skin. Helps to tighten pores and minimise the appearance of breakouts.

Formulated with moisturising hyaluronic acid and fermented polysaccharides that regulate the microbiome for a clear and healthy-looking complexion. Juniper stem sells and extracts of lichen and mate tea deliver strong soothing and antioxidant benefits. Targets both teenage and adult acne.

How to use: Apply to clean skin every morning and night. Use in combination with other ACNE formulas for the best results.

Ingredients: Aqua, Glycerin, Argania Spinosa (Argan) Kernel Oil, Pentylene Glycol, Polyglyceryl-6 Stearate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Cellulose, Sodium PCA, Isoamyl Laurate, Zinc PCA, Aroma, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Propanediol, Polyglyceryl-6 Behenate, Alcohol, Xanthan Gum, Ilex Paraguariensis (Mate) Leaf Extract, Palmitic acid, Stearic Acid, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Tocopherol, Potassium Hydroxide, Sodium phytate, Sodium Hyaluronate, Cetraria Islandica (Iceland Moss) Extract, Usnea Barbata (Lichen) Extract, Rhamnose, Juniperus Communis (Juniper) Callus Culture Extract, CI 77007 (Ultramarines), Glucose, Glucuronic Acid, Silica, Kaolin, Maltodextrin, CI 75815 (Chlorophyllin Copper Complex), Linalool, Citral, Limonene, Citronellol

* Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: MÁDARA Spot Roll-On 8ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Face Cleansing
Price: 13.90

This powerful, concentrated solution attacks blemishes on contact. Juniper Stem Cells and Salicylic Acid instantly get spots under control. Invisible to the skin.

How to use: Apply directly to blemishes. Reapply after 2 hours if necessary. For external use only. Keep out of the eye and lip area. For best results, use in combination with the rest of ACNE solutions.

Ingredients: Alcohol, Aqua, Salicylic Acid, Ilex Paraguariensis (Mate) Leaf Extract, Potassium Hydroxide, Cetraria Islandica (Iceland Moss) Extract, Usnea Barbata (Lichen) Extract, Juniperus Communis (Juniper) Callus Culture Extract

* Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: MÁDARA Intense Blemish & Pore Serum 20ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Face Cleansing
Price: 18.90

Enriched with soothing and keratolytic actives, this intensive cream helps to keep your complexion pure and balanced. Improves the condition and appearance of oily, clogged and problem-prone skin. Good for teenagers and adults.

How to use: Apply a thin layer on blemish-prone areas morning and/or night. Follow with a moisturiser. Use as a 6 week course or regularly. For best results, use in combination with the rest of ACNE solutions.

Ingredients: Aqua, Alcohol, Glycerin, Argania Spinosa (Argan) Kernel Oil, Cannabis Sativa (Hemp) Seed Oil, Melaleuca Alternifolia (Tea Tree) Leaf Oil, Polyglyceryl-6 Stearate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Salicylic Acid, Betaine, Ilex Paraguariensis (Mate) Leaf Extract, Sodium PCA, Tocopherol, Palmitic acid, Stearic Acid, Xanthan Gum, Zinc PCA, Polyglyceryl-6 Behenate, Cellulose, Potassium Hydroxide, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Cetraria Islandica (Iceland Moss) Extract, Usnea Barbata (Lichen) Extract, Juniperus Communis (Juniper) Callus Culture Extract, Maltodextrin, CI 75815 (Chlorophyllin Copper Complex), Limonene, Linalool

* Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.
